title: Pukka Pad Pastel A4 Jotta Notebooks – Pack of 3 Wirebound Notepads with 200 Pages, 100 Sheets of 80GSM Ruled Paper and Perforated 4-Hole Punched Margins – Pink, Blue, & Green, 29.7 x 22.4 cm
features: Fun Metallic Covers: These notebooks feature bold metallic hardback covers that make taking notes and making lists a little edgier

Polished Pastel: Keep your stationery pretty and professional with the pastel collection from Pukka Pad featuring blue, green, and pink notebooks, project books, reporter’s pads, and refill pads in various sizes to meet all your needs

Premium Construction: The ever-reliable Jotta notebook from Pukka Pad has 200 pages of 80GSM paper to prevent ghosting and bleeding, keeping each sheet as crisp and clean as the last for meeting minutes, lecture notes, or home schedules

Double Spiral Binding: The double spiral binding allows you to fold your notebook over and lay it flat for comfortable writing while maintaining a solid foundation for each page for ultimate convenience and durability
description: From the manufacturer More About The Products 200 pages of premium quality white writing paper.Four hole punched and perforated for easy removal.
